## **Common Contact Us**

# IT SysAdmin & Cloud Computing Advanced Program

# **Heading: IT SysAdmin & Cloud Computing Advanced Program**

![][image13]

# **About the Program**

The **IT SysAdmin & Cloud Computing Advanced Program** is a comprehensive, industry-oriented training program designed to prepare learners for modern IT infrastructure, cloud administration, and automation careers. The program combines Linux system administration, cloud computing, networking, infrastructure automation, security, and Generative AI to build practical, job-ready expertise. Through hands-on labs, real-world deployments, and enterprise projects, learners gain the skills required to manage, automate, monitor, and secure modern IT environments. By the end of the program, participants are equipped to confidently administer enterprise infrastructure across on-premises and cloud platforms.

---

# 

# **Program Overview**

The program follows a structured, project-based learning approach that combines Linux administration, networking, cloud computing, automation, infrastructure security, and Generative AI with practical implementation. Learners progress through industry-relevant modules covering Python scripting, AWS cloud services, Docker, Ansible, observability, enterprise networking, and cloud infrastructure management.

Each module includes live mentor-led sessions, practical labs, infrastructure deployments, real-world case studies, and a comprehensive capstone project that strengthens hands-on cloud administration and automation skills. Industry experts provide continuous mentorship and career guidance throughout the learning journey.

By the end of the program, learners gain the confidence to deploy, manage, automate, monitor, and secure enterprise IT infrastructure using modern cloud technologies.

---

# **Comprehensive Curriculum**

### **1\. Linux Administration & Enterprise Infrastructure**

Develop a strong foundation in Linux system administration, shell scripting, networking, storage management, and enterprise server configuration. Learn to administer production environments using industry best practices.

### **2\. Cloud Computing & Infrastructure Automation**

Master AWS cloud services, virtualization, Docker, Kubernetes fundamentals, Python scripting, and Ansible automation to deploy scalable and reliable cloud infrastructure.

### **3\. Enterprise Networking & Infrastructure Security**

Learn TCP/IP networking, routing, switching, VPNs, cloud networking, information security, identity management, and infrastructure protection techniques required for enterprise environments.

### **4\. Cloud Operations & GenAI**

Build production-ready cloud infrastructure by integrating Linux, AWS, networking, automation, monitoring, observability, and GenAI-powered infrastructure management through real-world implementation.

---

# **Tools & Technologies Used**

### **1\. System Administration & Programming**

Gain practical experience with Linux, Python, Bash scripting, SQL, and system administration tools used to manage enterprise infrastructure.

### **2\. Cloud & Infrastructure Platforms**

Work with AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, virtualization technologies, cloud networking, and enterprise infrastructure services used across modern organizations.

### **3\. Automation & Monitoring Tools**

Learn Ansible, infrastructure automation frameworks, observability platforms, monitoring solutions, logging tools, and performance management technologies.

### **4\. AI & Productivity Tools**

Leverage ChatGPT, Google Gemini, and GenAI-powered automation tools to simplify infrastructure management, generate scripts, troubleshoot systems, optimize cloud resources, and improve operational efficiency.

---

# **Hands-on Industry Projects**

### **1\. AI-Powered Cloud Infrastructure Automation**

Develop an intelligent infrastructure automation platform that provisions, configures, monitors, and manages cloud resources using AWS, Python, Ansible, Docker, and Generative AI.

### **2\. Enterprise Multi-Cloud Infrastructure Management**

Build a secure, highly available cloud infrastructure integrating virtual machines, networking, storage, load balancing, identity management, backup, disaster recovery, and infrastructure monitoring.

### 

### **3\. Intelligent Infrastructure Monitoring & Observability Platform**

Design a centralized monitoring solution that collects infrastructure metrics, analyzes logs, predicts failures using AI, and automates alerting and incident management across enterprise environments.

### **4\. Enterprise Cloud Infrastructure Capstone Project**

Develop a complete cloud-based enterprise infrastructure by integrating Linux administration, AWS services, networking, Docker, Python automation, infrastructure monitoring, security, Ansible, and GenAI-powered cloud operations into a production-ready solution.

---

# **Learning Outcomes**

### **1\. Build Strong Infrastructure Administration Skills**

Develop expertise in Linux administration, enterprise networking, AWS cloud services, virtualization, automation, and infrastructure management using industry-standard tools and practices.

### **2\. Deploy & Manage Cloud Infrastructure**

Learn to deploy, configure, secure, automate, and manage scalable cloud environments using AWS, Docker, Kubernetes fundamentals, Python, and Ansible.

### **3\. Automate Modern IT Operations**

Apply infrastructure automation, observability, cloud monitoring, scripting, security best practices, and AI-assisted operational workflows to improve system reliability and efficiency.

### **4\. Become Industry Ready**

Graduate with practical cloud administration experience, enterprise infrastructure projects, and professional skills that prepare you for high-demand careers in cloud computing, IT operations, and infrastructure management.

---

# 

# **Industry-Recognized Certification**

Upon successful completion of the program, learners receive an **IT SysAdmin & Cloud Computing Advanced Program Certification** from **Anshiya Innovations**, recognizing their practical expertise in Linux administration, cloud computing, enterprise networking, infrastructure automation, AWS, and GenAI-powered IT operations. The certification validates hands-on experience gained through practical labs, real-world cloud deployments, and the enterprise capstone project, and can be showcased on resumes, LinkedIn profiles, and professional portfolios to demonstrate industry-ready infrastructure management skills.

---

# **Career Opportunities**

The comprehensive, project-based curriculum prepares learners for diverse roles in Cloud Computing, System Administration, Infrastructure Automation, and IT Operations. Graduates gain the confidence to contribute to modern technology organizations in positions such as **System Administrator, Cloud Administrator, Linux Administrator, AWS Cloud Engineer, Infrastructure Engineer, DevOps Associate, Cloud Operations Engineer, IT Infrastructure Engineer, Site Reliability Engineer (SRE), Platform Support Engineer, Infrastructure Automation Engineer,** and **Cloud Support Engineer**.

---

# **Common Contact Us**

# SAP BTP Internship Program

# **Heading: SAP BTP Internship** 

# **About the Program**

The **SAP BTP Internship** is a practical, industry-oriented internship program designed to help learners build enterprise cloud application development skills using SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP). The program combines SAP cloud technologies, enterprise application development, integration, automation, databases, and Generative AI to prepare participants for modern SAP careers. Through mentor-led training, hands-on labs, live enterprise projects, and guided learning, learners gain confidence in developing, deploying, integrating, and managing enterprise cloud applications. The internship prepares participants for SAP development and enterprise technology roles in today's rapidly evolving digital business landscape.

---

# **Program Overview**

The program follows a structured, hands-on learning approach that combines SAP enterprise technologies with practical cloud application development using SAP BTP. Learners progress through modules covering SAP HANA Cloud, SAP Business Application Studio, SAP Fiori, SAPUI5, Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP), SAP Integration Suite, SAP Build Process Automation, DevOps, and AI-powered enterprise services.

Each module includes live mentor-led sessions, practical lab exercises, coding assignments, real-world enterprise use cases, and project-based learning that strengthen cloud application development skills. Experienced SAP professionals provide continuous guidance throughout the internship to ensure practical understanding and industry readiness. 

By the end of the program, participants gain the confidence to build, integrate, deploy, and manage enterprise-grade SAP cloud applications using modern SAP technologies.

---

# 

# 

# **Comprehensive Curriculum**

### **1\. SAP BTP Foundations & Cloud Platform**

Build a strong foundation in the SAP ecosystem by learning SAP Business Technology Platform, SAP HANA Cloud, Cloud Foundry, SAP Business Application Studio, enterprise cloud architecture, security, and cloud application deployment.

### **2\. Enterprise Application Development**

Develop modern enterprise applications using SAP Fiori, SAPUI5, Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP), Node.js, Java, SAP HANA Cloud, OData services, authentication, and enterprise application design principles.

### **3\. Enterprise Integration & Business Automation**

Learn SAP Integration Suite, API Management, Event Mesh, SAP Build Apps, SAP Build Process Automation, workflow automation, business rules, and enterprise system integration using industry-standard practices.

### **4\. AI-Powered Enterprise Solutions**

Build intelligent enterprise applications using SAP AI Core, SAP AI Launchpad, Joule AI, Generative AI Hub, DevOps practices, CI/CD pipelines, cloud deployment, monitoring, and enterprise AI services.

---

# **Tools & Technologies Used**

### **1\. SAP Cloud Technologies**

Gain practical experience with SAP BTP, SAP HANA Cloud, SAP Business Application Studio, SAP Fiori, SAPUI5, and Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP) used to develop enterprise cloud applications.

### **2\. Enterprise Development & Integration**

Work with Node.js, Java, SQL, OData Services, REST APIs, SAP Integration Suite, SAP Build Apps, SAP Build Process Automation, and enterprise integration technologies.

### 

### **3\. DevOps & Cloud Operations**

Learn Git, GitHub, CI/CD pipelines, cloud deployment, monitoring, logging, application security, and performance optimization for enterprise cloud environments.

### **4\. AI & Enterprise Productivity Tools**

Leverage SAP AI Core, SAP AI Launchpad, Joule AI, Generative AI Hub, ChatGPT, and Google Gemini to build intelligent enterprise applications, automate workflows, and improve business productivity.

---

# **Hands-on Industry Projects**

### **1\. AI-Powered Employee Self-Service Portal**

Develop an intelligent employee portal using SAP Fiori, SAP Build Process Automation, SAP HANA Cloud, and SAP AI services to automate HR requests, approvals, employee onboarding, and internal support processes.

### **2\. Smart Procurement & Vendor Management Platform**

Build a cloud-native procurement application using SAP BTP, CAP Framework, SAP Integration Suite, SAP HANA Cloud, and AI-powered document processing to streamline vendor onboarding, purchase approvals, invoice verification, and procurement workflows.

### **3\. Intelligent Enterprise Asset Management System**

Create an AI-enabled enterprise asset management solution that integrates SAP BTP, SAP HANA Cloud, IoT-ready services, SAP Build Automation, and predictive maintenance capabilities for monitoring enterprise assets and maintenance operations.

### **4\. Enterprise SAP BTP Capstone Project**

Build a comprehensive enterprise cloud application by integrating SAP BTP, SAP HANA Cloud, SAP Fiori, SAPUI5, CAP Framework, SAP Integration Suite, SAP Build Process Automation, DevOps pipelines, and SAP AI services to solve a real-world business problem from development through deployment.

---

# **Learning Outcomes**

### **1\. Develop Enterprise Cloud Development Skills**

Build practical expertise in SAP BTP, SAP HANA Cloud, SAP Fiori, SAPUI5, enterprise cloud architecture, cloud-native application development, and SAP ecosystem technologies.

### **2\. Master Enterprise Integration & Automation**

Gain hands-on experience in SAP Integration Suite, SAP Build Process Automation, enterprise APIs, workflow automation, cloud integration, and business process digitization.

### **3\. Apply AI in Enterprise Applications**

Learn to use SAP AI Core, SAP AI Launchpad, Joule AI, Generative AI Hub, prompt engineering, and AI-powered enterprise services to build intelligent business applications.

### **4\. Become Enterprise SAP Ready**

Graduate with practical experience in enterprise cloud development, SAP application deployment, automation, DevOps, AI-powered business solutions, and real-world SAP projects that prepare you for modern enterprise technology careers.

---

# **Industry-Recognized Internship Certification**

Upon successful completion of the program, learners receive an **SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP) Internship Certification** from **Anshiya Innovations**, recognizing their practical expertise in SAP cloud application development, SAP HANA Cloud, SAP Fiori, SAP Integration Suite, SAP Build Process Automation, DevOps, and AI-powered enterprise solutions. The certification validates hands-on experience gained through live projects, practical lab exercises, coding assignments, and the enterprise capstone project. Learners can showcase the certification on their resumes, LinkedIn profiles, GitHub portfolios, and professional portfolios to demonstrate industry-ready SAP BTP development skills.

---

# 

# **Career Opportunities**

The practical, project-based curriculum prepares learners for diverse roles in SAP Enterprise Development, Cloud Computing, Business Technology Platform, and Digital Transformation. Graduates gain the confidence to contribute to SAP-driven organizations in positions such as **SAP BTP Developer, SAP Fiori Developer, SAPUI5 Developer, SAP CAP Developer, SAP Cloud Application Developer, SAP Integration Developer, SAP Build Developer, SAP HANA Cloud Developer, SAP Technical Consultant, SAP Application Developer, SAP Cloud Engineer,** and **Junior SAP Technology Consultant**.

---

# **Common Contact Us**

# SAP S/4HANA Internship Program

# **Heading: SAP S/4HANA Internship Program**

# **About the Program**

The **SAP S/4HANA Internship Program** is a practical, industry-oriented training program designed to help learners build enterprise resource planning (ERP) skills using SAP S/4HANA. The program combines core SAP business processes with hands-on experience in Finance, Procurement, Sales, Manufacturing, Warehouse Management, Analytics, and SAP Fiori to prepare participants for modern enterprise technology careers. Through live mentor-led sessions, real-world business scenarios, guided projects, and practical implementation, learners gain confidence in configuring, managing, and optimizing SAP S/4HANA business processes. The program prepares participants to succeed in today's digital enterprise environment.

---

# **Program Overview**

The program follows a structured, hands-on learning approach that combines enterprise business process management with practical implementation using SAP S/4HANA. Learners progress through modules covering SAP ERP fundamentals, organizational structures, Financial Accounting (FI), Materials Management (MM), Sales & Distribution (SD), Production Planning (PP), Extended Warehouse Management (EWM), SAP Fiori, Analytics, and cross-functional business process integration.

Each module includes interactive mentor-led sessions, practical SAP exercises, real-world business scenarios, and enterprise projects that strengthen functional consulting and ERP implementation skills. Experienced SAP professionals provide continuous guidance throughout the learning journey to ensure practical understanding and business process expertise.

By the end of the program, participants are equipped with the confidence and practical SAP skills required for enterprise ERP implementation and support roles.

---

# 

# **Comprehensive Curriculum**

### **1\. SAP ERP & Enterprise Business Foundations**

Build a strong understanding of SAP ERP, SAP S/4HANA architecture, enterprise organizational structures, SAP GUI, SAP Fiori, business processes, and master data management used across modern organizations.

### **2\. Core SAP Functional Modules**

Develop practical expertise in Financial Accounting (FI), Materials Management (MM), Sales & Distribution (SD), Production Planning (PP), and Extended Warehouse Management (EWM) through real-world business process implementation.

### **3\. Enterprise Business Process Integration**

Learn end-to-end business workflows including Procure-to-Pay (P2P), Order-to-Cash (O2C), Record-to-Report (R2R), and Plan-to-Produce while understanding cross-functional SAP module integration.

### **4\. SAP Analytics & Digital Enterprise**

Explore SAP Fiori Launchpad, Embedded Analytics, KPI dashboards, Smart Business applications, enterprise reporting, and business intelligence tools to support data-driven decision-making.

---

# **Tools & Technologies Used**

### **1\. SAP ERP Platforms**

Gain practical experience with SAP S/4HANA, SAP GUI, SAP Fiori, SAP Fiori Launchpad, and SAP Analytics to manage enterprise business operations efficiently.

### **2\. SAP Functional Modules**

Learn industry-standard SAP modules including SAP FI, SAP MM, SAP SD, SAP PP, SAP EWM, and integrated enterprise business process management.

### 

### **3\. Business Productivity Tools**

Work with Microsoft Excel, enterprise reporting tools, SAP master data management, business process documentation, and workflow management techniques.

### **4\. Enterprise Analytics & Reporting**

Explore SAP Embedded Analytics, KPI dashboards, Smart Business applications, operational reporting, business performance monitoring, and enterprise decision-support tools.

---

# **Hands-on Industry Projects**

### **1\. Intelligent Procurement & Supplier Management System**

Develop a complete procurement solution using SAP MM and SAP FI to automate vendor onboarding, purchase requisitions, purchase orders, goods receipt, invoice verification, inventory updates, and supplier performance tracking.

### **2\. Smart Sales & Customer Order Management Platform**

Build an integrated sales management application using SAP SD and SAP FI to manage customer inquiries, quotations, sales orders, deliveries, billing, pricing, and Order-to-Cash (O2C) business processes.

### **3\. Digital Manufacturing & Supply Chain Solution**

Create an enterprise manufacturing platform integrating SAP PP, SAP MM, and SAP EWM to manage material planning, production scheduling, warehouse operations, inventory optimization, and supply chain workflows.

### **4\. Enterprise SAP S/4HANA Capstone Project**

Develop a comprehensive enterprise ERP solution by integrating SAP FI, MM, SD, PP, EWM, SAP Fiori, and Embedded Analytics to automate end-to-end business operations, enterprise reporting, and cross-functional business process management for a real-world organization.

---

# 

# **Learning Outcomes**

### **1\. Build Enterprise ERP Skills**

Develop practical expertise in SAP S/4HANA, enterprise business processes, master data management, SAP Fiori, and integrated ERP workflows used by global organizations.

### **2\. Master SAP Functional Modules**

Gain hands-on experience in Finance, Procurement, Sales, Manufacturing, Warehouse Management, and enterprise reporting through practical implementation of SAP business processes.

### **3\. Apply Enterprise Business Process Integration**

Learn to configure organizational structures, execute end-to-end business workflows, generate business reports, and optimize enterprise operations using SAP best practices.

### **4\. Become Industry Ready**

Graduate with practical SAP implementation experience, enterprise business process knowledge, and real-world project exposure that prepares you for successful careers in SAP consulting, ERP implementation, and enterprise business solutions.

---

# **Industry-Recognized Certification**

Upon successful completion of the program, learners receive an **SAP S/4HANA Internship Certification** from **Anshiya Innovations**, recognizing their practical expertise in SAP S/4HANA, enterprise resource planning, Financial Accounting (FI), Materials Management (MM), Sales & Distribution (SD), Production Planning (PP), Warehouse Management (EWM), SAP Fiori, and integrated business process management. The certification validates hands-on experience gained through practical assignments, enterprise business scenarios, and the capstone project. Learners can showcase the certification on their resumes, LinkedIn profiles, and professional portfolios to demonstrate industry-ready SAP ERP implementation skills.

---

# 

# **Career Opportunities**

The practical, project-based curriculum prepares learners for diverse roles in Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP), SAP Functional Consulting, and Digital Business Transformation. Graduates gain the confidence to contribute to SAP-driven organizations in positions such as **SAP S/4HANA Functional Consultant, SAP MM Consultant, SAP SD Consultant, SAP FI Consultant, SAP PP Consultant, SAP EWM Consultant, SAP Business Process Analyst, ERP Functional Consultant, SAP Support Associate, SAP End User Consultant, SAP Associate Consultant,** and **ERP Business Analyst**.

---
